airbnb.name: Casa Roma - Charming Courtyard Apartment
airbnb.address: Calle Orizaba 142, Roma Norte, Cuauhtémoc, 06700 CDMX

events.name: Land at MEX Airport
events.notes: Terminal 1. Grab pesos at the ATM in arrivals — better rate than the exchange booth.

events.name: Uber to Airbnb
events.notes: ~45 min ride depending on traffic. Use the Uber pickup zone outside Terminal 1.
events.personalNote: Dad — don't try to haggle with the taxi guys, just use the app

events.name: Check in & settle
events.notes: Host Maria will meet us. Drop bags, freshen up.
events.personalNote: Mom — the courtyard is gorgeous, you'll love it

events.name: Walk around Roma Norte
events.notes: Casual stroll through the neighborhood. Beautiful Art Deco buildings and tree-lined streets.

events.name: Dinner at Contramar
events.notes: Iconic seafood spot. Get the tuna tostadas and the red/green grilled fish.
events.personalNote: Get there right at 7:30 — it fills up fast

events.name: Breakfast at Café El Popular
events.notes: Classic CDMX diner. Open 24hrs. Chilaquiles are the move.

events.name: Palacio de Bellas Artes
events.notes: Stunning Art Nouveau/Deco palace. See the Diego Rivera and Orozco murals inside.
events.personalNote: Mom — the stained glass curtain is unreal

events.name: Walk through Alameda Central
events.notes: Oldest public park in the Americas. Nice shaded walk.

events.name: Lunch at El Huequito
events.notes: OG tacos al pastor since 1959. Order at the counter.

events.name: Templo Mayor Museum
events.notes: Aztec ruins right next to the Zócalo. The museum is small but fascinating.
events.personalNote: Dad — you're gonna nerd out here

events.name: Mezcal tasting at Bósforo
events.notes: Tiny mezcal bar in Centro. Ask the bartender to guide you through a flight.

events.name: Dinner at Azul Histórico
events.notes: Beautiful courtyard restaurant in a colonial mansion. Traditional Oaxacan cuisine.

events.name: Breakfast at the Airbnb
events.notes: Grab pastries from Panadería Rosetta the night before, make coffee at the apartment.

events.name: Frida Kahlo Museum (Casa Azul)
events.notes: Tickets pre-purchased! Arrive 15 min early. No large bags allowed.

events.name: Lunch at Los Danzantes
events.notes: Beautiful garden restaurant right off the Coyoacán plaza. Great mole.

events.name: Wander Coyoacán Market & Plaza
events.notes: Browse the artisan market, get ice cream, soak in the village vibe.

events.name: Uber back to Roma Norte
events.notes: ~30 min ride. Rest up at the apartment before dinner.

events.name: Dinner at Pujol
events.notes: World-famous tasting menu. Smart casual dress code. Reservation confirmed.
events.personalNote: This is the splurge meal — worth every peso

events.name: Breakfast at Lalo!
events.notes: Trendy brunch spot in Condesa. The ricotta hotcakes are insane.

events.name: Mercado Roma
events.notes: Upscale food hall. Great for browsing and snacking. Good coffee upstairs.

events.name: Walk through Condesa & Parque México
events.notes: Beautiful Art Deco neighborhood. The park has a great running/walking loop.

events.name: Free time / siesta
events.notes: Recharge at the apartment or explore on your own. Check the Explore tab for nearby spots!

events.name: Rooftop drinks at Supra
events.notes: Great views of the city. Mezcal cocktails.

events.name: Dinner at Máximo Bistrot
events.notes: Farm-to-table Mexican bistro. Small menu that changes daily. Reservations made.

events.name: Breakfast at Panadería Rosetta
events.notes: Best bakery in the city. Get the guava roll and a cortado.

events.name: Last walk & souvenir shopping
events.notes: Hit the shops on Álvaro Obregón. Great ceramics and textiles.

events.name: Check out of Airbnb
events.notes: Leave keys on the kitchen counter per Maria's instructions.

events.name: Uber to MEX Airport
events.notes: Allow extra time — Monday traffic can be rough. Terminal 1.

events.name: Flight home
events.notes: ¡Hasta luego, CDMX! 🇲🇽

places.name: Contramar
places.note: Best tuna tostadas in CDMX. Get there by 1pm or expect a wait.

places.name: El Huequito
places.note: OG tacos al pastor since 1959. Order at the counter, eat standing up.

places.name: Pujol
places.note: World #12 restaurant. The mole madre (1000+ days old) is a must. Book weeks ahead.

places.name: Los Danzantes
places.note: Garden courtyard dining. Great mole and mezcal selection.

places.name: Máximo Bistrot
places.note: Farm-to-table, daily changing menu. Small and intimate. Reserve.

places.name: Lalo!
places.note: Best brunch in the city. Ricotta hotcakes are legendary. Expect a line on weekends.

places.name: Panadería Rosetta
places.note: Bakery from the Rosetta chef. Guava roll, olive bread, cortado. Go early.

places.name: Taquería Orinoco
places.note: Monterrey-style tacos. The chicharrón prensado is a must-try.

places.name: Café El Popular
places.note: Classic 24hr diner. Cheap, authentic, no-frills chilaquiles.

places.name: Rosetta
places.note: Italian-Mexican fine dining in a gorgeous mansion. The pasta is incredible.

places.name: El Vilsito
places.note: Auto mechanic by day, taco stand by night. Seriously. Best late-night tacos.

places.name: Eno
places.note: Upscale deli and wine bar. Great charcuterie and sandwiches for a light meal.

places.name: Azul Histórico
places.note: Courtyard restaurant in a colonial mansion. Traditional Oaxacan cuisine.

places.name: Baltra Bar
places.note: Incredible mezcal cocktails. Try the smoked pineapple.

places.name: Bósforo
places.note: Tiny mezcal bar. Let the bartender guide you through a flight.

places.name: Limantour
places.note: World's 50 Best Bars list. Creative cocktails, great vibe.

places.name: Supra
places.note: Rooftop bar. Great sunset views and mezcal cocktails.

places.name: Café Avellaneda
places.note: Best specialty coffee in Coyoacán. Single-origin Mexican beans.

places.name: Departamento
places.note: Cozy neighborhood coffee shop. Great for a quiet afternoon cortado.

places.name: Palacio de Bellas Artes
places.note: Art Nouveau/Deco masterpiece. Rivera and Orozco murals inside. Free on Sundays.

places.name: Frida Kahlo Museum (Casa Azul)
places.note: Frida's actual home. Buy tickets online in advance — they sell out.

places.name: Templo Mayor Museum
places.note: Aztec ruins in the heart of the city. Small but mind-blowing.

places.name: Museo Nacional de Antropología
places.address: Av. Paseo de la Reforma, Chapultepec
places.note: World-class museum. The Aztec Sun Stone alone is worth the visit. Allow 3+ hours.

places.name: Chapultepec Castle
places.note: Castle on a hill with panoramic city views. Great murals inside.

places.name: Soumaya Museum
places.address: Blvd. Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra, Polanco
places.note: Free admission! Wild building. Huge Rodin collection. The top floor view is great.

places.name: Parque México
places.note: Beautiful Art Deco park in Condesa. Great for a morning walk or afternoon rest.

places.name: Mercado Roma
places.note: Upscale food hall. Great for browsing and snacking. Good coffee upstairs.

places.name: Coyoacán Market
places.note: Artisan market with great crafts and textiles. Bargain respectfully.

places.name: La Ciudadela Market
places.note: Best spot for souvenirs. Huge variety of folk art, ceramics, textiles. Fixed prices mostly.

places.name: FONART
places.address: Av. Paseo de la Reforma 116, Juárez
places.note: Government-run folk art store. Fair trade, high quality, fixed prices.

phrases.spanish: Una mesa para cuatro, por favor
phrases.phonetic: OO-nah MEH-sah PAH-rah KWAH-troh, por fah-VOR

phrases.english: Can I have the check, please?
phrases.phonetic: meh TRA-eh la KWEN-tah, por fah-VOR

phrases.english: To the right / To the left
phrases.spanish: A la derecha / A la izquierda
phrases.phonetic: ah la deh-REH-chah / ah la ees-kee-AIR-dah

phrases.english: Can you take me to this address?
phrases.phonetic: meh PWEH-deh yeh-VAR ah ES-tah dee-rek-see-ON

phrases.english: Can you give me a better price?

phrases.spanish: Llame a un doctor / una ambulancia
phrases.phonetic: YAH-meh ah oon dok-TOR / OO-nah ahm-boo-LAHN-see-ah
DON-deh eh-STAH el os-pee-TAHL mahs ser-KAH-no
